title: Advancing clinical cohort selection with genomics analysis on a distributed platform.
author: Smith JM Lathara M Wright H Hill B Ganapati N Srinivasa G Denny CT
content: S-EPMC7179830 PMC7179830 Advancing clinical cohort selection with genomics analysis on a distributed platform.
